title: Black Yi New Testament (1948)
title_vernacular: 黑彝新約全書 - ꆈꌠꉙ [Sichuan Yi]
description: Digital edition of the Black Yi New Testament (1948). Created by Simon Wong. Digital edition © United Bible Societies, 2018.

language.name: Sichuan Yi
language.area: North Yunnan, south Sichuan, mainly in Greater and Lesser Liangshan mountains. Spoken in over 40 counties.
